summary: Completed testing of InvertisConnect new features: Community Feed, Blog interactions, Admin Analytics, and auto-generated Alumni IDs. Backend API health is good, but frontend has session management issues causing intermittent authentication failures.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Intermittent 401/403 responses due to session expiry

ui_bugs.issue: Supabase sessions expire quickly causing frequent logouts

integration_issues.issue: Page loading issues due to session expiry
Sneha Gupta not found in pending alumni list

passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/) returns running status
Admin can access Community Feed from sidebar
Alumni can access Community Feed from sidebar
Student can access Community Feed from sidebar
Alumni can access blog writing page
Blog feed endpoint returns proper structure
Setup check confirms database tables exist
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Supabase session management - sessions are expiring too quickly causing 403 'Session from session_id claim in JWT does not exist' errors. This affects admin analytics, verify alumni, and users management pages. Also verify that Sneha Gupta is properly seeded in pending alumni status.
